zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian於大約1140年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾朗 巴可比時，他的父親Lord Saher de Quincy51歲，母親Matilda de Senlis51歲。他於大約1152年與Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars在英國諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1171年在英國蘇格蘭洛迪安被列為justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.)。他去世於1197年9月29日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian于大约1140年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾朗 巴可比时，他的父亲Lord Saher de Quincy51岁，母亲Matilda de Senlis51岁。他于大约1152年与Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars在英国諾薩普頓史爾布拉可利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1171年在英国苏格兰洛迪安被列为justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.)。他去世于1197年9月29日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian was born about 1140, in Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Lord Saher de Quincy, was 51 and his mother, Matilda de Senlis, was 51. He married Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars about 1152, in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1171, his occupation is listed as justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.) in Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 29 September 1197, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian est né environ 1140, à Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Saher de Quincy, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Senlis, avait 51 ans. Il a épousé Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars environ 1152, à Brackley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1171, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.) à Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1197, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian um 1140 in Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Saher de Quincy 51 und seine Mutter Matilda de Senlis 51. Er hat um 1152 in Brackley, Northamptonshire, England Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1171 ist sein Beruf als justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.) in Lothian, Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 29. September 1197 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian è nato il circa 1140 nel Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Saher de Quincy, aveva 51 anni e il suo madre, Matilda de Senlis, aveva 51 anni. Lui sposato Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars circa 1152, nel Brackley, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1171, la sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.) nel Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 29 settembre 1197, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothianが約1140年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアロング ブクビーで生まれた時，父Lord Saher de Quincyは51歳，母Matilda de Senlisは51歳であった。約1152年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブラックリーでJudith Orabilis FitzNess o Leucharsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1171年，イギリススコットランドロスアンでの職業はjusticiar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.)と記録されている。彼は1197年9月29日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 노르섬프토실르 론그 벅비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Saher de Quincy(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Senlis(은)는 51세였다. 그는 대략 1152년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라클리에서 Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1171년, 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드 로스이언에서 justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.)이었다. 그는 1197년 9월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Saher de Quincy, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Matilda de Senlis, tinha 51 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars aproximadamente 1152, em Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1171, sua profissão aparece como justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.) em Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1197, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian родился около 1140 г. в местности лонг буккби, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Saher de Quincy было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Senlis, 51. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars около 1152 г. в местности браккли, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1171 году он работал по профессии justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.) в местности лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 29 сентября 1197 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Quincy Justiciar of Lothian nació aproximadamente 1140, en Long Buckby, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Saher de Quincy, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Matilda de Senlis, tenía 51 años. Se casó con Judith Orabilis FitzNess o Leuchars aproximadamente 1152, en Brackley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1171, su ocupación registrada era justiciar (an administrator of justice.  either of two supreme judges in medieval scotland.) en Lothian, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1197, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
